basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Regulatory Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. (Power Systems, Energy Systems, Renewable Energy, Power Management, Energy Economics, or related fields), M.E./M.Tech./MS (Power Systems, Energy Systems, Renewable Energy Technologies, Power Management or related fields) + 4 years relevant experience, Master's (Power Sector Regulation, Public Policy, Regulatory Affairs, Energy Economics, or related fields) + 4 years relevant experience, B.Tech. with M.B.A./eMasters (Power Sector Regulation, Power Systems, Energy Management, Renewable Integration or related fields) from reputed Universities/Institutes + 4 years relevant experience, B.Tech (Power Systems, Electrical, Mechanical, Energy, or related fields) from reputed Universities/Institutes + 6 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Ph.D. (Power Systems, Energy Systems, Renewable Energy, Power Management, Energy Economics, or related fields) M.E./M.Tech./MS (Power Systems, Energy Systems, Renewable Energy Technologies, Power Management or related fields) + 4 years relevant experience Master's (Power Sector Regulation, Public Policy, Regulatory Affairs, Energy Economics, or related fields) + 4 years relevant experience B.Tech. with M.B.A./eMasters (Power Sector Regulation, Power Systems, Energy Management, Renewable Integration or related fields) from reputed Universities/Institutes + 4 years relevant experience B.Tech (Power Systems, Electrical, Mechanical, Energy, or related fields) from reputed Universities/Institutes + 6 years relevant experience

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the Regulatory Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is 10th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Regulatory Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Regulatory Research Fellow post announced by IIT Kanpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Regulatory Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Regulatory Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 1,23,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria include qualifications like Ph.D., M.E./M.Tech./MS, Master's, or B.Tech. with MBA/eMasters, along with specific years of relevant experience depending on the qualification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Regulatory Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Regulatory Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur will involve a Zoom online interview.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Regulatory Research Fellow job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of IIT Kanpur or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Regulatory Research Fellow position at IIT Kanpur is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with a pincode of 208016.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for comprehensive information on age limits and relaxations.
